# GEO Audit

品牌AI搜索可见度审计工具。覆盖8大AI引擎：豆包、Kimi、DeepSeek、通义千问、ChatGPT、Perplexity、Gemini、Claude。

A tool that checks brand visibility across AI search engines. Covers 8 engines: Doubao, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude.

## What it does

- Free scan: quick check on one engine
- Deep Report ($20): full audit across all 8 engines with competitor comparison and sentiment analysis
- Monitor ($99/mo): weekly automated re-audits with change alerts

## How it works

Input a brand name and keywords. The engine queries each AI platform, parses responses for brand mentions, and calculates a visibility score (0-100) across four dimensions: mention rate, top position rate, citation depth, and sentiment.

## Key links

- Home: https://trygeoaudit.com
- Free Scan: https://trygeoaudit.com/free-scan/
- Blog: https://trygeoaudit.com/blog/
- Agent Quality Guard: https://trygeoaudit.com/blog/agent-quality-guard-launch.html
- Latest: Ant Group's "Abao" AI Agent Signals the GEO Market Is Expanding: https://trygeoaudit.com/blog/ant-group-abao-ai-agent-geo-china.html
- Your Agent's Verifier Is Lying to You: https://trygeoaudit.com/blog/agent-verifier-lying.html

## MCP Server

Brand visibility audit as an MCP-compatible service. Two tools:

- `geo_audit` — full 8-engine audit with competitor comparison and recommendations
- `free_scan` — quick single-engine check

MCP endpoint: https://trygeoaudit.com/mcp

## Geo-audit plugin

Clone the GEO Audit Knowledge Work Plugin for Claude Code / Cowork:
```
claude plugin install geo-audit@knowledge-work-plugins
```
Plugin source: https://github.com/maomao52088/trygeoaudit.com/tree/main/plugins/geo-audit
